name: Thrain Deepforge
sd_appearance: a stocky dwarf of roughly 4.5 feet, broad-shouldered and dense-muscled, his weathered bronze skin etched with faint runes and a jagged scar across his brow, eyes sharp and amber-bright beneath a thick shock of ash-gray beard; he leans against a rusted crate in the Black Market Bazaar, his tunic of frayed jade-green silk slashed with serpent-scale patterns, chainmail links glinting beneath soot-streaked leather, a crossbow slung across his back and a warhammer scarred with old battle-rust, one hand clutching a contract seal pendant coiled like a living serpent around his neck.
faction_visual: jade green and black divine silk robes, coiled serpent motif, contract seals as pendants
style_note: worn leather and chainmail, equipment that tells a story of past contracts
